stages.label: effective-config preflight
stages.summary: Effective-config preflight passed and produced canonical audit artifacts.

stages.label: targeted subsystem harnesses
stages.summary: Targeted subsystem harnesses detected promotion-blocking regressions.

families.label: Hoarding pressure imbalance
families.description: Detects candidates that leave hoarding too safe or push the economy toward a new dominant anti-play strategy.

metric_results.label: Dominant strategy pressure must not rise.

families.proves: The cheap anti-hoarding harness did not show the candidate worsening safe-strategy dominance.
families.cannot_prove: Does not prove cross-subsystem pricing or retention interactions remain healthy at full scale.

families.label: Lock-in down while expiry dominance rises
families.description: Detects the known wall where lock-ins fall and natural expiry grows instead of improving the lock-in/expiry balance.

metric_results.label: Lock-in timing spread must not collapse.

families.proves: Short-horizon lock-in and expiry incentives did not recreate the previously observed structural failure.
families.cannot_prove: Does not prove long-run repeat-season retention or full-economy stability.

families.label: Skip/rejoin exploit worsened
families.description: Detects repeat-season candidates that reward skipping or make healthy re-entry less attractive.

metric_results.label: Skip-heavy players must not gain edge.
Throughput lock-in rate must not fall.

families.proves: Short lifecycle retention dynamics did not make the skip/rejoin exploit materially stronger.
families.cannot_prove: Does not prove final long-run concentration is globally acceptable outside this reduced harness.

families.label: Star affordability and pricing instability
families.description: Detects candidates that make early star access worse or create unstable pricing behavior even in a reduced star-market slice.

metric_results.label: Star purchase density must not fall.
Early star access must not fall.
Time at price cap must not rise.
Price range volatility must not rise.

families.proves: The focused star-market slice did not show weaker affordability or more unstable price movement.
families.cannot_prove: Does not prove production star-price behavior under the full player mix or full-duration seasons.
